chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5932 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.18653/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.18654/2025 3. For orders on office objection No.22 & 29 4. For hearing of CMA No.26319/2024 5. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, advocate for the petitioners --------- Learned counsel for the petitioners states that on account of order dated 05.08.2025 passed by the Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-XV Central Karachi, this petition has become infructuous, which is accordingly disposed of in terms of order dated 05.08.2025 alongwith listed application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
